saved_test.name: Verb to Be: Future — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for future forms of to be: will be affirmative, negative (won't be), questions (Will … be …?), short answers, contractions, first conditional, future passive, future in the past, and formal register across A1–C2.
